body.title: Implement D232 startup shim — bash + ps1
body.result: igor (bash) and igor.ps1 (PowerShell) both live at repo root. Crash auto-fixer, restart loop, pause.wait semaphore, debug_session.flag all implemented.
body.description: D232. Linux/Mac: ~/bin/igor + ~/bin/superclaude bash scripts with shared _igor_common.sh. Windows: %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\WindowsApps\igor.ps1 + superclaude.ps1 with _igor_common.ps1. Windows scripts must be native (not WSL2 container) — Igor needs OS-level access for network/process diagnostics. Linux/Mac scripts become docker run wrappers after T-containerize lands. Alerts to file only (no Discord). File-only until T-containerize completes, then update Linux/Mac scripts to wrap docker run.
